query:
INSERT INTO product_usage_pricing (
                id,
                product_id,
                tenant_id,
                variant_id,
                usage_rates,
                metadata,
                created_at,
                updated_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
                usage_rates = VALUES(usage_rates),
                metadata = VALUES(metadata),
                updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
